ability_adjustments.note: Drow have +2 CHA (in addition to standard elf adjustments)

class_options.note: Drow females can also be Cleric/Fighters with higher level limits.

level_limits.note: Drow females have higher cleric level limits than males.

magic_resistance.description: Drow have a base 50% magic resistance, plus 2% per level.

innate_spell_abilities.description: All drow can use the following abilities once per day at 1st level.
innate_spell_abilities.note: Drow noble houses may have additional abilities.

sleep_charm_resistance.description: 90% resistant to sleep and charm spells (as standard elves).

light_sensitivity.description: Drow are adversely affected by bright light. They suffer -2 to attack rolls and opponents gain +2 to saves vs. drow spells when in bright light (sunlight or continual light). Drow must adjust for 2-5 rounds when entering bright light.

surprise_bonus.description: If the drow is alone, not in metal armor, and moving quietly, surprise on 4 in 6.

stealth_cloak.description: Drow wear special cloaks that grant 75% undetectability in shadowy conditions. These cloaks lose their power when exposed to sunlight for extended periods.

equipment_notes.drow_equipment: Drow equipment (armor, weapons, cloaks) is created using special radiation in the Underdark. It degrades and becomes non-functional after 1d20+30 days of exposure to sunlight.
equipment_notes.adamantite: Drow chain mail is made of adamantite and is equivalent to elven chain mail.

society_notes: Drow are matriarchal, worshipping Lolth (the Spider Queen). They dwell in the Underdark in vast underground cities.
